_comment: Performance baseline for perf-gate.yml. Values in ms/op (JMH avgt). GitHub Actions runners are slower and noisier than local machines, so baselines are set conservatively. Update when a legitimate improvement lands.
notes: Local baseline is ~20 ms/op (post AC-3 incremental restore). CI runners are ~2x slower, so 45 ms/op leaves room for variance. Tighten once 2-3 real runs have established the CI noise floor.
